title_en: Cinnamon Secret: Are You Using the Right Kind?
title_es: ¿El Secreto de la Canela: Estás Usando el Tipo Correcto?
hook_en: What's the cinnamon secret? Let me show you!
hook_es: ¿Cuál es el secreto de la canela? ¡Déjame mostrarte!
key_message: Use Ceylon cinnamon over Cassia to avoid liver-harming coumarin.
visual_elements: close-up of two cinnamon jars labeled Ceylon and Cassia
props_needed: two jars of cinnamon (Ceylon and Cassia)
_source_food_context: • INGREDIENT: Cinnamon (Ceylon) — Can help regulate blood sugar levels and improve insulin sensitivity (Tip: Use Ceylon cinnamon (not Cassia) — Cassia contains coumarin which can harm the liver in large doses)

title_en: Cinnamon Magic: Control Your Blood Sugar!
title_es: ¡La Magia de la Canela: Controla Tu Azúcar en Sangre!
hook_en: Want to control your blood sugar naturally? Spice it up!
hook_es: ¿Quieres controlar tu azúcar de forma natural? ¡Añade un poco de canela!
key_message: Ceylon cinnamon helps regulate blood sugar and improves insulin sensitivity.
visual_elements: graphics of blood sugar levels dropping
animated insulin receptor and glucose entering cell
_source_food_context: • INGREDIENT: Cinnamon (Ceylon) — Can help regulate blood sugar levels and improve insulin sensitivity (Tip: Use Ceylon cinnamon (not Cassia) — Cassia contains coumarin which can harm the liver in large doses)
